meaning: n.流浪者,徘徊者,迷路的动物
examples: This wanderer is no stranger to me!
A frantic wanderer and witness of Gods law.
Poe the man, Mr Ackroyd tells us, “has become the image of the poète maudit, the blasted soul, the wanderer.”
We've never had a reasonable chance of locating such a wanderer until today, however.
Comments by fans on the club's Facebook page included "embarrassed to be a Wanderer", "disgusting decision" and calls to boycott buying the shirts.
